description_long: This is an adult male figure dressed in tactical attire, featuring a fitted shirt with a prominent skull emblem on the chest, tactical vest, and gloves. The figure wears straight-cut pants with a utility belt that holds holstered equipment on both sides. The hands are gloved, and the arms are extended outward horizontally. The face is clean-shaven with short, neatly styled hair. The footwear appears to be sturdy, suitable for urban or tactical environments. Accessories such as the tactical vest and holsters suggest a readiness for action or law enforcement context.
description: A male adult in tactical gear with a skull-emblazoned shirt, gloves, and utility belt, standing with arms outstretched. The figure is equipped for urban or law enforcement scenarios.
description_view_0: Front view showing the skull emblem on the shirt, tactical vest, gloves, and facial features.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, arm, and holstered equipment on the belt.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the vest, belt, and holsters, with arms extended.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile of the head, arm, and holstered equipment on the opposite side.
attribute_clothing_type: tactical shirt with emblem, tactical vest, utility belt, straight-cut pants, fingerless gloves
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
